resumeRag.title: Resume Questions
resumeRag.subtitle: Answers are grounded in resume evidence loaded into the DB.
resumeRag.empty: Ask a question and the answer will appear here.

pending.title: Searching evidence and generating with Codex
pending.description: The API is retrieving public resume evidence from the DB and generating an answer.

noEvidence.title: Not enough evidence
noEvidence.description: The retrieved public resume evidence is insufficient, so confidence is shown as low.

origin-blocked.title: Request is not allowed
origin-blocked.description: This question API only accepts requests sent from the official VSCoke production site.

auth-required.title: Login required
auth-required.description: Resume questions require an authenticated session.

auth-expired.title: Session expired
auth-expired.description: Refresh your session and ask again.

service-unavailable.title: Answer generation is not ready
service-unavailable.description: Codex app-server, embedding settings, or vector indexing needs attention.

rate-limited.title: Request limit reached
rate-limited.description: Wait briefly, then retry the same question.

contract.title: Unexpected response shape
contract.description: The API response contract does not match what this screen expects.

request.title: Failed to request an answer
request.description: Check the network or API state, then try again.

resume.name: Sangmin Lee
introduction: I have focused on service development while building tools needed for products and operations.
I set up LLM Wiki and configure project-specific AI workflows to fit each team's work.

oprimed.achievement: Worked on medical and clinical analysis product screens, charts, analysis-data save/read flows, development environment, and verification systems.

medicalFrontendProductization.title: Medical and Clinical Analysis Product Screens and Analysis Data

descriptions.subtitle: Medical and Clinical Analysis Product Screens and Analysis Data
descriptions.detail: Worked on input screens, result screens, charts, and analysis-data save/read flows for a medical and clinical analysis product. Beyond screen implementation, I designed structures that prevent invalid analysis requests and let users re-enter screens with the same data basis.
descriptions.skills: React, Next.js, TypeScript, CSS, TanStack Query, Zustand, React Hook Form, ECharts, Plotly, Playwright, GitHub Actions, Husky, Docker, Shell Script
tasks: Developed product screens including analysis input, result screens, charts, file upload, and file download.
Removed 6 direct disease-list calls left in screens and hooks, and managed the same lookup basis in one place.
Designed the server-save structure for analysis task data and the client cache strategy so screen navigation and re-entry use the same data basis.
Strengthened missing validation and error cases, and processed data uploads in chunks.
Converted image-based UI into shared components and CSS to reduce unnecessary image requests and change cost.
Reduced Lighthouse LCP from 1.3s to 1.0s and Speed Index from 3.4s to 0.7s.

descriptions.subtitle: Development Environment and Verification System
descriptions.detail: Aligned project-specific execution and deployment methods so failures could be caught earlier before changes were pushed. I also worked on E2E tests for key browsers and viewport sizes, and on an AI-based development environment.
tasks: Unified the execution and deployment methods across 4 frontend projects.
Organized GitHub Actions-based deployment and verification flows.
Made type errors and build failures visible before pushing changes, preventing failed changes from reaching remote branches.
Built a test system that checks core screen flows across key browsers and viewport sizes.
Preserved project context through task-specific skills, execution hooks, LLM Wiki, and PR checks so AI tools would not arbitrarily interpret difficult domain terms or screen states.

descriptions.subtitle: Operations Automation, Mobile WebView, Commerce, and Back-office Development
descriptions.detail: Joined as an early member and developed commerce, a video platform, mobile webviews, a back office, and operations automation tools. I worked on both customer-facing screens and operator work screens, and moved repetitive content operations work into web tools.
descriptions.skills: Next.js, React, TypeScript, MUI, Tailwind CSS, Jotai, SWR, React Hook Form
tasks: Developed multilingual, payment, gifting, draw, product, order, and my-page screens.
Moved the existing back office into a new frontend structure and developed order, product, seller, settlement, event, and inquiry management screens.
Applied search reset, file export, drag-and-drop sorting, shared tables, dialogs, and form components.

subtitleSystem.title: Content Operations Automation with a Subtitle Translation Management Tool

descriptions.subtitle: Moved CLI-based subtitle translation into a web management tool
descriptions.detail: Moved subtitle translation from a CLI workflow into a web management tool so operators could process it directly.
descriptions.skills: TypeScript, AWS Bedrock, OpenAI API, Google Cloud Translate, Express
tasks: Handled subtitle file processing, language-specific prompts, translation review, and character matching in the management screen.
Reduced team resources spent on repetitive translation work by over 90% and increased productivity by more than 10x.
Enabled operators to process 6-8 works per day.

shortimePlayground.title: Mobile WebView Playground Planning and Implementation

descriptions.subtitle: Built a webview area for event and game-style content without app releases
descriptions.detail: Planned and built a webview area where event and game-style content could be opened and updated without an app release.
descriptions.skills: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Phaser, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, Flutter bridge, Airbridge
tasks: Developed different content types such as events, fortune content, games, and draws as separate domains in a Next.js-based webview area.
Handled Phaser games, ranking/result submission, banner and sound control, and Flutter bridge integration.
Connected deep links and marketing SDKs to entry flows inside and outside the app.

descriptions.subtitle: Moved repetitive manual checks into a crawling-based tool
descriptions.detail: Moved unauthorized-content checking work from repetitive manual searches into a crawling-based tool.
descriptions.skills: TypeScript, Express, Axios, Cheerio, Vercel Serverless Functions
tasks: Built a keyword-based crawling tool and result-review screen.
Reduced daily checking work from 50 minutes to under 10 minutes.
Separated bot-blocked browser crawling areas into Node.js-based processing.

descriptions.subtitle: Insurance subscription screen with reduced initial display delay
descriptions.detail: Reduced a section where the insurance subscription screen could take up to 5 seconds to complete the initial display.
descriptions.skills: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Redux, Context API
tasks: Removed nested callbacks and simplified the order of data preparation, state reflection, and rendering.
Moved React-based screens into a Next.js structure and reset routing and rendering standards.
Achieved 1.2s LCP on the subscription screen.

tasks: Built responsive insurance subscription screens and payment-information input flows.
Built subscription lists, detail screens, statistics charts, report download, and file upload/download features.
Shared upload/download handling and types to reduce admin-screen maintenance cost.
